---
title: "Hostility Map"
subtitle: "Pedestrian hostility index across the study area"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
```

```{r hostility-map}
roads <- st_read("data/roads_hostility.gpkg", quiet = TRUE) |>
  filter(region != "Outside Study Area") |>
  st_transform(4326)

pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = c("#2ecc71","#f1c40f","#e67e22","#e74c3c"),
  domain  = c(0, 1),
  na.color = "#cccccc"
)

leaflet(roads) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    color       = ~pal(hostility_index),
    fillColor   = ~pal(hostility_index),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    radius      = 3,
    popup       = ~paste0(
      "<b>", coalesce(name, "(unnamed)"), "</b><br>",
      "Type: ", highway, "<br>",
      "Speed: ", round(speed_final, 0), " mph<br>",
      "Lanes: ", lanes_final, "<br>",
      "Sidewalk: ", coalesce(sidewalk, "unknown"), "<br>",
      "Hostility: ", round(hostility_index, 3), "<br>",
      "Components used: ", components_used, "/5<br>",
      "Region: ", region
    )
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal      = pal,
    values   = ~hostility_index,
    title    = "Hostility Index",
    position = "bottomright",
    labFormat = labelFormat(digits = 2)
  )
```
